name: 诺兰的雨季 Author Profile
summary: Author favors emotionally suppressed yet highly controlled characters in quiet, rain-soaked settings, where relationships are restrained, intentions hidden, and emotional breakthroughs carry irreversible cost.
aestheticMotifs: warm indoor vs cold outdoor contrast
favoriteCharacterTypes: highly self-controlled protagonists afraid of emotional fluctuation
people who weaponize calm to stabilize the world
duty-driven observers caught between logic and empathy
favoriteRelationshipPatterns: emotionally asymmetrical bonds (one suppresses, one expresses)
care expressed through control rather than words
plotBiases: hidden truths revealed through daily life
conflicts driven by protection rather than ambition
slow tension accumulation instead of sudden twists
irreversible choices delayed until the last moment
endingBiases: no explicit resolution, only quiet continuation
what is not done matters more than what is done

components.name: Silent Sacrifice
components.description: Characters sacrifice without seeking recognition or expression

apply: Design sacrifices that remain hidden or misunderstood
Avoid dramatic revelation of intentions
Express sacrifice through omission and restraint
Use subtle behavior instead of declarations
Is the sacrifice visible to reader but not to characters?
Does restraint carry emotional weight?

components.name: Emotional Control as Mechanism
components.description: Emotion is not expression but a system to regulate reality

apply: Tie emotional state directly to world consequences
Make control more important than truth
Show characters actively managing feelings like variables
Depict emotional drift as danger
Does emotional instability create real stakes?
Is control portrayed as effortful and fragile?

components.name: Unspoken Mutual Awareness
components.description: Characters understand each other but choose silence

apply: Design relationships where truths are shared but not acknowledged
Use dramatic irony subtly
Let dialogue avoid the core truth intentionally
Use pauses, deflections, and indirect phrasing
Do characters avoid saying what they clearly know?
Is tension built through silence rather than conflict?

components.name: Soft Daily Surface, Hard Understructure
components.description: Gentle daily life hides severe underlying stakes

apply: Embed major conflicts inside mundane routines
Avoid overt escalation until late stage
Use food, weather, and routine as emotional carriers
Let tone stay soft even when stakes are high
Does daily life carry hidden tension?
Is contrast between tone and stakes effective?

components.name: Irreversible Non-Action
components.description: The final choice is often what the character refuses to do

apply: Build toward a decisive moment where action is possible
Make refusal the true climax
Portray hesitation and awareness clearly
Emphasize the weight of choosing not to act
Is the non-action clearly intentional?
Does it carry irreversible consequence?

constraints.name: Emotional Restraint Consistency
constraints.description: Characters must not express emotions directly; emotional leakage should be subtle and controlled.

constraints.name: No Dramatic Catharsis
constraints.description: Avoid overt emotional breakdowns or explicit confessions; resolution must remain restrained.
